UAE Edition

2026–27 Travel Planner

For Dubai’s working professionals who refuse to stop exploring.
8 windows AUG 2026 – AUG 2027 UAE holiday calendar

Living in the UAE is a travel cheat code — you’re 3–6 hours from almost everywhere. Every public holiday hides a long weekend, and the trick is matching the season to the place: chase cool air in summer, sun in winter.

This is our personal 2026–27 calendar — save it, screenshot it, plan your year around it.

Save this 📌
before you plan

How to use this planner

We bridge public holidays into long weekends, plan the big trips around school breaks, and always match the destination to the season. One rule above all: in summer, chase cooler air — there’s no point flying somewhere hotter than Dubai.

✓ — Places we’ve been
✦ — On our wishlist
rest of 2026

August – December

Prophet’s Birthday
Tue, Aug 25, 2026 · take 1 day → 4-day escape
  • Georgia ✓
  • Turkey ✓
  • Kazakhstan ✦
  • Kyrgyzstan ✦

Cool mountain air while Dubai’s still melting. 😅

National Day
Tue–Thu, Dec 1–3, 2026 · take 1 day → 6-day break
  • Maldives ✓
  • Sri Lanka south ✓
  • Singapore ✦
the big one

Christmas & New Year

Christmas → New Year
Fri Dec 25, 2026 → Fri Jan 1, 2027 · take 4 days → 9-day stretch
  • New York City (Christmas snow) ✓
  • Lapland / Finland ✓
  • Maldives ✓
  • Seychelles ✓
spring wakes up

Eid Al Fitr
March 2027 · ~5-day break (dates shift with the moon)
  • Turkey ✓

  • Jordan ✦
  • Egypt ✦
Spring
April 2027 · tulip season
  • Netherlands (tulips) ✓
  • Morocco ✓
  • Azerbaijan ✦
into summer

May – June 2027

Eid Al Adha
Late May 2027 · ~3–4 day break (dates shift with the moon)
  • Dolomites / Italy ✓
  • Central Europe ✦
Mid-June
June 2027 · before the deep summer heat
  • South Africa ✓
  • Europe summer ✓
escape the heat
July – August 2027
Peak summer — safari + cool Europe
  • Kenya / Tanzania safari ✦
  • Zambia (visiting next week) ✦
  • Zimbabwe (visiting next week) ✦
  • Switzerland ✦
  • Scandinavia ✦
  • Iceland ✦

No point flying somewhere hotter than Dubai. 😅

match the season to the place. then go.
